rulings.Case Title: SALLY SCULLY VS. HYATT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, OCTOBER 31, 2006. DEFENDANT HYATT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ARE DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT VIOLATED DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS OR OLICE CODE. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN RE PREMISES LIABILITY RE EXERCISE OF CONTROL. DENY PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. Prevailing party to PREPARE ORDER CCP 437c(g). =(302/req/KD)
